contact.headline: Contact us
contact.description: Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.success_description: Your message has been correctly sent. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error_default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.error_unable_to_send: Unable to send message. Please try again later.
contact.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

newsletter.headline: Stay updated
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest news and updates.
newsletter.success: Thank you! You've been subscribed successfully.
newsletter.error_default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
newsletter.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
newsletter.error_invalid_request: Invalid request. Please check your email.
newsletter.error_unable_to_subscribe: Unable to subscribe. Please try again later.
newsletter.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
